text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is the daughter of a famous stage
actor, but she has chosen to go down the path of
racing rather than theater.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her path may be different, but with her eyes set
on a destination only she can reach, she is just as
determined to make her fans proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First on the list is conquering the Classic Triple
Crown. Then, it's becoming an unrivaled
entertainer. Fuji Kiseki's journey to achieve her
lofty goals starts now!
